title: Pin a Group to the Top of a Board
excerpt: Would really love to see the ability to Pin a group to the top of a board.  There’s currently no way to keep a group of focus at the very top; it’s easy for groups to get buried quickly as new groups are added.

posts.author: ceeps (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml: Would really love to see the ability to Pin a group to the top of a board. There’s currently no way to keep a group of focus at the very top; it’s easy for groups to get buried quickly as new groups are added.
